overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a modded GTA V showing a female character jogging through an open urban lot in a Honolulu-inspired city setting. The character moves past tall residential towers and hotels including the Hawaiian Monarch Hotel, with clear summer skies and scattered trees throughout the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open paved lot between high-rise residential towers

agents.ego_description: jogging steadily forward through the open lot with tall buildings visible to the left

entered.detail: tall rectangular apartment building with repetitive window patterns
modern curved glass tower visible behind the beige building
scattered green trees lining the right side of the open area
low gray concrete wall running along the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: The character jogs through a wide open paved lot on a clear summer day. A tall beige residential tower dominates the left side while scattered trees line the right. The camera follows smoothly from behind as the character moves steadily forward through the empty urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined open area with apartment buildings

events.description: character begins turning right and moving toward a more densely treed area

agents.ego_description: turning right and jogging through a section with scattered trees and different building views

entered.detail: medium-height residential building with horizontal lines
low-rise white structure visible between the trees

segments.scene_description: The character turns right and continues jogging through an open area with moderate tree coverage. The tan apartment block becomes visible on the right while the previous tall beige tower moves out of view behind. The ground remains paved asphalt with patches of shadows from the trees.

events.description: text overlay appears identifying Hawaiian Monarch Hotel and Waikiki Landmark

agents.ego_description: running forward toward the tall Hawaiian Monarch Hotel with a curved glass skyscraper visible to the left

entered.detail: very tall thin skyscraper with the text overlay identifying it as the Hawaiian Monarch Hotel
modern high-rise with curved glass facade and horizontal stripes
low-rise brown parking garage with horizontal levels

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Hawaiian Monarch Hotel, a distinctive tall thin skyscraper that dominates the center view. A modern curved glass skyscraper rises on the left while a low parking structure appears in the center foreground. Text overlay identifies the location as the Hawaiian Monarch Hotel and Waikiki Landmark.

agents.ego_description: jogging around the parking structure area with the hotel now to the right side

entered.detail: small yellow building visible in the distance to the right

segments.scene_description: The character continues jogging around the low parking structure, which now dominates the center view. The Hawaiian Monarch Hotel moves to the right and exits the frame while the curved glass skyscraper recedes into the left distance. The environment remains an open paved lot with sparse trees and distant mountains visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open urban lot that transitions from a residential area into a dense cluster of Waikiki skyscrapers. It begins by following the character from behind as she jogs across a wide paved lot flanked by a tall beige residential tower and scattered trees. As she turns right, the initial tower recedes and the landscape shifts toward a more wooded open area with patches of shade on the asphalt. The scene then opens up to reveal the distinctive, thin silhouette of the Hawaiian Monarch Hotel and a modern curved glass skyscraper rising in the center view. Finally, the camera tracks the character around a low parking structure, causing the hotel to exit the frame while distant mountains become visible across the open paved expanse.
